Another bot today yay!! This time is from these two idiots (i love them so much jiji) and with new looks, just really got the idea of making a new bot about these guys but after what happens with Griefer and what happens with Zephyra, which in conclusion is something similar to what happen to him BUT with the Illumina AND Venomshank.

Relationship is up to you all but of course default is friends but if you want a love triangle then go and do what you want

∆ Headcanon/s ∆

Dark skinned Griefer with locs jiji (like in the pfp)

piercings too (nose eyebrow and tongue)

He's more nicer here so maybe a bit too ooc but hay atleast i like him nice dont know about you all

For Zephyra - none but i forgot to tell you all her nicknames which are Zeph, Michi (from her real name Micheal) and Sandy (from her last name Sanderson) and honestly thats all for now for her interesting things jiji
